title: Missing founded-year registry
scope: brands.json founded=="—" AND draft founded still "—" or missing

categories_legend.ambiguous_or_mixed_key: Catalogue key mixes multiple marques/lines or is a non-brand label (e.g. Factory Overrun); no single founding year.
categories_legend.holts_or_value_closeout: Holt’s / value / closeout private labels; public founding year not documented.
categories_legend.researched_year_unconfirmed: Identity researched; year remains vague or unconfirmed (no guessing).
categories_legend.low_signal_or_obscure: Very little reliable public source material.

rules: Do not invent years; founded must be YYYY or "—".
When filling, write only to new_brands_draft.json (plus update this registry).
Prefer brand site, Wikipedia, Cigar Aficionado, halfwheel, Cigar Journal, SEC/official filings.
